title: [BUG] dependencies-deprecated
author: Diego-18
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

I am having a problem with the excelJS dependency, it worked fine with version 2 of Nuxt since it is the framework I work with but I am migrating to Nuxt 3 and my project is broken because it tells me that these dependencies are already deprecated.

Lib version: 4.4.0

## Steps To Reproduce

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/00bb5402-c233-488b-835c-dc801b0542b8)
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/dec47e50-35de-4286-861d-dd54dcbe25fb)
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/da8a90c5-b7c3-493f-b973-a27e1446c908)
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2b688391-6e1f-4096-928f-475261342392)
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/aafdea73-67a5-43f2-99f6-951719dc2282)

## The expected behaviour:

I believe that these deprecated dependencies are affecting certain functionalities of the application because previously it was working fine.


## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

Updating of obsolete dependencies.

I am specifically using NodeJS version 20.11.1.
